title: Validate fragmentation interoperability
description: Run cross-language Python/Rust/C fragmentation vectors and end-to-end loss/retransmission scenarios after all migrations; reconcile documentation and public API consistency.
acceptance_criteria: All implementations produce byte-identical fragments/ACKs and recover identical packets across missing-tile and MIC-failure scenarios.
close_reason: RFC 8724 SCHC standardization and cross-impl consistency complete with authoritative parameters, updated spec, vectors, interop tests and verification of identical output across Rust/Python/Zephyr. All quality gates passed.
